title: arctotis dimorphocarpa
intro: Arctotis dimorphocarpa, also known as the African daisy or Stiff-leafed arctotis, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its leaves and flowers. The health benefits of Arctotis dimorphocarpa include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. Arctotis dimorphocarpa is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
